Homework was taking us at least an hour and what should have been a 30 minute or less time, and he was crying every afternoon. As time progressed I noticed he was having issues with other things. I was informed to ask for a visual and auditory learning processing disorder test because they do not tell you that they offer them. I did so and he did not meet requirements for the visual by just a couple points and met qualifications for the auditory but the school refused to provide the Necessities needed for him to succeed. They tried to make me believe they did not have to do it because it was a medical disorder as well. Which is not true. They refused to help do the therapy for it are the assisted technology assistance device with apps for it.
